inputs.name: image
inputs.semantic_hint: RGB image resized to [448, 640], loaded from cloud storage paths parsed in preprocess.py

ground_truths.name: y_true_od

evidence.snippet: def compute_losses(y_true: tf.Tensor, y_pred: tf.Tensor) -> Tuple[Any, Any, Any]:

ground_truths.semantic_hint: Object detection ground truth tensor containing bounding box coordinates and class labels, formatted for YOLO loss. Encodes up to MAX_BB_PER_IMAGE=150 bounding boxes across 3 classes (car, truck, pedestrian). Used as y_true in all loss/metric functions.

unknowns: This repository contains NO PyTorch code. All DL operations use TensorFlow/Keras. The lead pack scanner (pytorch-leads-v1) produced false positives.
The Tensorleap leap_binder entry point (defining input/GT encoders, model loader, etc.) is missing from the repo snapshot — only utility modules (config, preprocess, gcs_utils, metrics) are present.
The model forward-call and actual DataLoader/Dataset are not visible; the .h5 model is loaded externally by the Tensorleap platform.
Exact y_true tensor layout depends on code_loader.helpers.detection.utils.true_coords_labels which is an external dependency.
